name: Shenzhen Zhilai Sci and Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Zhilai Sci and Tech Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services lockers in China and internationally. The company offers delivery, refrigerator, barcode, RFID, APP, and charging lockers. It also provides after-sale services. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
